ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M) */,
  "size_value" TEXT /* Value of the size (e.g., 28, 30, 32) */,
  "low_waist" REAL /* Measurement for low waist in inches */,
  "hip" REAL /* Measurement for hip in inches */,
  "inner_leg" REAL /* Measurement for inner leg in inches */,
  "bust" REAL /* Measurement for bust in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Measurement for sleeve length in inches */,
  "garment_length" REAL /* Measurement for garment length in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size in the sizes table */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* Size value in UK sizing */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* Size value in US sizing */,
  "eu_it_size" INTEGER /* Size value in EU/IT sizing */,
  "aus_size" INTEGER /* Size value in AU sizing */,
  "jp_size" INTEGER /* Size value in JP sizing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "clothing_line" TEXT /* Name of the clothing line (e.g., women, men, kids) */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size in the sizes table */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement for the size chart */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement for the size chart */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement for the size chart */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement for the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing item (e.g., T-shirt, Pants) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the clothing item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image for the clothing item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_sizes" (
  "item_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item-size combination */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item in the clothing_items table */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size in the sizes table */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock for the specific size */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the item will be restocked if out of stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sizes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order in the orders table */,
  "item_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item-size combination in the item_sizes table */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item in the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_size_id") REFERENCES item_sizes ("item_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the supplier */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the supplier (out of 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_suppliers" (
  "item_supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item-supplier relationship */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item in the clothing_items table */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier in the suppliers table */,
  "supply_price" REAL /* Price at which the supplier provides the item */,
  "lead_time_days" INTEGER /* Lead time in days for the supplier to deliver the item */,
  "delivery_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of deliveries from the supplier (e.g., weekly, bi-weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_suppliers_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_suppliers_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "item_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item-size combination in the item_sizes table */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the item in the inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_size_id") REFERENCES item_sizes ("item_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_options" (
  "shipping_option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping option */,
  "shipping_carrier" TEXT /* Name of the shipping carrier (e.g., USPS, UPS, FedEx) */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., ground, air, express) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the shipping option */,
  "delivery_time" INTEGER /* Estimated delivery time in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order in the orders table */,
  "item_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item-size combination in the item_sizes table */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return was processed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_item_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_size_id") REFERENCES item_sizes ("item_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
